name: agency-care
description: Agency Care Enterprise — ระบบดูแล/เข้าเยี่ยม Agency ภาคสนาม (MVP เฟส 1)

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter ./shared build && corepack pnpm --filter ./api build && corepack pnpm --filter ./web build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter ./shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter ./api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter ./web typecheck
scripts.ci: corepack pnpm --filter ./api prisma:validate && corepack pnpm --filter ./api prisma:generate && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
